page_content:
Prerequisite: 1 course with a minimum grade of C- from (KNES320, KNES360).

Restriction: Must have earned a minimum of 75 credits.

KNES466 Graded Exercise Testing (3 Credits)

Functional and diagnostic examination of the cardiovascular responses

to graded exercise testing. Emphasis on electrophysiology, mechanisms of arrhythmias, normal electrical activation of the heart, axis termination and the normal 12-lead electrocardiogram.
